description: Style Note Comfortable, casual dressing at it's best, this T-shirt from classic polo guarantees effortless style whatever the occasion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans or chinos and casual shoesProduct Details Purple and black polo T-shirt, has a spread collar, a two-buttoned chest placket, short sleeves, embroidered brand logo on the left chest, and a vented hemMaterial and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with similar colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size XM
